general.name: Third Baptist West Frankfort
general.description: Third Baptist West Frankfort is a church family of regular people whose lives are being transformed more and more every day by the Good News of Jesus Christ. Join us for Sunday School at 9:30am and worship at 10:40am in West Frankfort, Illinois.

hero.text: A church family in West Frankfort learning to follow Jesus and live sent together

form.heading: Stay Connected
form.description: Newsletter signup can be enabled when an email provider is connected.

give.heading: Give to Third Baptist
give.description: Online giving can be added when the giving provider URL is available.
